principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Industrial robustness
Content is King: Every pixel must serve the user's goal (Demo Request)
Zoom In: Focus on dashboard details and metrics
Negative Space: Generous breathing room between sections

layout_strategy.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A for Features, Mode B for Modules)
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned headings for readability, Centered only for final CTA

Problem.style: Minimalist, Icon-heavy, Red/Warning accents for 'Pain Points'

OwnerManager.content: Switch between 'Owner View' (Profits, ROI) and 'Manager View' (Shifts, Inventory)

Testimonials.style: Cards with Avatar, Star Rating, and Quote

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Outfit and Plus Jakarta Sans to index.css via @import.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the brand colors (#0D1B3E, #38B6FF) and fonts.
3. BUILD HEADER: Sticky glassmorphism header. Logo: Combine Lucide 'Fuel' + 'TrendingUp' icons.
4. HERO SECTION: Build a custom 'Dashboard Mockup' using CSS Grid and absolute positioning. Do NOT use an image for the UI.
5. MODULES: Use the Bento Grid layout. Make cards hoverable with a subtle 'lift' (translate-y-1).
8. FORMS: Create a comprehensive Demo Request form (Name, Pump Name, Phone, Email, Location).
9. FOOTER: Dark Navy background. Simple, clean links.
10. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for backgrounds and avatars.
11. ICONS: Use Lucide-React for all icons. Stroke width 1.5px.
